notes: Ingredient codes not explicitly locked by source are generated from Vietnamese ingredient names and require owner/code review before production seed.

G1 recipe CSV is scaffold-ready as PILOT_PERCENT_BASED: anchor fields and is_anchor are derived mechanically from the largest source quantity per recipe; owner_review_required remains true for production formula approval.
quantity_per_batch_400 is retained as source quantity evidence for G1 owner review, while ratio_percent is normalized to SUM approximately 100 per recipe for PILOT seed validation.
M03A supplier fixtures are DEV_TEST_ONLY and seed R-SUPPLIER scoped permissions, M03A admin supplier permissions, plus op_supplier_ingredient allowlist data for Supplier Portal smoke.
effective_from is a technical seed date for dev/QA; production go-live effective date remains owner-controlled.
UOM, source/procurement, GTIN, event schema, and UI registry fixtures were added to cover required seed groups from database/07_SEED_DATA_SPECIFICATION.md.
RAW_LOT_READY_FOR_PRODUCTION and RAW_LOT_MARK_READY are included so QC_PASS remains distinct from READY_FOR_PRODUCTION before material issue.

GTIN and MISA rows are DEV_TEST_ONLY fixtures and must be replaced/configured before production go-live. GTIN fixture status uses is_test_fixture=true, not identifier_type=TEST_FIXTURE; production rows must use is_test_fixture=false.

PF-02 production config values for MISA, printer/device, evidence storage, backup/DR, notification outbox consumer, and production user assignment are config/secret/data imports with owners; no real secret is stored in this manifest.
QR_VOID is seeded as a distinct permission for audited QR void workflow; do not reuse QR_REPRINT or PRINT_JOB_CREATE for void.
